content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

February 23, 2010

Judge Runston G. Maino
P.O. Box 122724
San Diego, CA 92112-2724

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-10-043

Dear Judge Maino:

This letter confirms the receipt of your February 18, 2010, request for advice regarding the responsibilities of the Administrative Office of the Courts (AOC). While the Commission may provide informal assistance to persons who have duties under the Act (see Regulation 18329(c)(1)), you have not indicated you are seeking advice on behalf of AOC. Under the provisions of Regulation 18329, unless you are an authorized representative of the person for whom you seek assistance, the Fair Political Practices Commission cannot address your questions or provide analysis. (Regulation 18329(b)(8)(B) and (c)(1).) Therefore, your request is withdrawn. I enclose a copy of Regulation 18329 for your review.

Should you have any additional questions regarding this matter, please contact the Commission at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Scott Hallabrin
General Counsel

By: John W. Wallace
Assistant General Counsel

JWW:jgl
Enclosure
